title: Rebuild Version 9 with CETA Galaxy logo from Version 16

requirements.summary: Restore the full frontend application to the Version 9 state, preserving all layouts, sections, content, styling, and functionality exactly as they were in that version
acceptanceCriteria: All page sections (Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, Footer) match Version 9 exactly
All Version 9 styling, animations, and content are intact

file_operations.description: Restore the App.tsx component structure to match Version 9 exactly, ensuring all sections are rendered in the correct order with LanguageProvider wrapper
Restore Navigation component to Version 9 state with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, language toggle, and dual logos layout (will reference Version 16 CETA logo in REQ-2)

Restore HeroSection to Version 9 with animated countdown timer, count-up stat cards, logo row, headline, scroll-to-survey CTA, and maroon gradient background (will reference Version 16 CETA logo in REQ-2)
Restore AboutSection to Version 9 state with animated timeline (2010–2026), descriptive paragraphs, chairman profile card with quote, and intersection observer scroll animations
Restore VisionPillarsSection to Version 9 with 4-pillar strategic framework, animated cards using intersection observer, icons, titles, checklist items, and distinct brand colors

Restore ReunionSection to Version 9 detailing the April 12, 2026 HOPE Alumni Reunion event with reunion poster, event details card, purpose icons grid, participant category cards, and intersection-observer animations
Restore SurveySection to Version 9 with links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys, confidentiality badge, branded CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 poster card, and scroll animations

Restore StakeholderVoicesSection to Version 9 showcasing six stakeholder insight cards from February 2026 meetings with icons, titles, descriptions, meeting badge pills, and scroll-triggered animations
Restore DigitalImpactSection to Version 9 displaying four digital transformation initiatives as animated icon cards in a responsive grid with intersection observer

Restore Footer to Version 9 with CTA banner, action buttons, dual organization logos, contact info, social media links, newsletter subscription form wired to backend, and copyright bar (will reference Version 16 CETA logo in REQ-2)
Restore LeafMotif decorative background component to Version 9 rendering up to 5 absolutely-positioned rotated diamond/leaf shapes with configurable count, opacity, and color
Restore LanguageContext to Version 9 providing bilingual (English/Malayalam) support with translation function t() and language toggle, with all UI string translations defined inline

Restore global stylesheet to Version 9 defining the CGCT design system with CSS custom properties for brand colors (maroon, gold, sage), Tailwind base/utilities, typography, and reusable animation and component utility classes
Restore Tailwind configuration to Version 9 defining custom brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), typography/font families, animations, shadows, and plugin setup
Restore useCountdown hook to Version 9 counting down to 12 April 2026, 9:00 AM IST, updating every second and returning days, hours, minutes, seconds, and expiry flag
Restore useCountUp hook to Version 9 animating a number from 0 to target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with ease-out cubic curve
Restore useIntersectionObserver hook to Version 9 using IntersectionObserver to set isVisible flag once element enters viewport, then disconnect observer

requirements.summary: Replace the CETA Galaxy logo used in Version 9 with the CETA Galaxy logo asset from Version 16 and update all references in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx to use the Version 16 logo file
acceptanceCriteria: The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the Navigation bar matches the Version 16 logo asset
The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the HeroSection matches the Version 16 logo asset
The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the Footer matches the Version 16 logo asset
The HOPE logo remains unchanged from Version 9

file_operations.description: Update the CETA Galaxy logo reference to use the Version 16 logo asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-galaxy-logo.dim_512x512.png while keeping the HOPE logo unchanged from Version 9

Update the CETA Galaxy logo reference in the logo row to use the Version 16 logo asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-galaxy-logo.dim_512x512.png while keeping the HOPE logo unchanged from Version 9

Update the CETA Galaxy logo reference in the dual organization logos section to use the Version 16 logo asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-galaxy-logo.dim_512x512.png while keeping the HOPE logo unchanged from Version 9
